documents.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
documents.description: Common Paper standard terms for a mutual NDA, protecting confidential information exchanged between two parties evaluating a business relationship.

documents.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
documents.description: Fill-in cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, capturing purpose, effective date, term, confidentiality period, governing law, and signatures. Incorporates the Standard Terms by reference.

documents.name: Cloud Service Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement governing the provision and use of a cloud-based (SaaS) product between a provider and a customer.

documents.name: Design Partner Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage collaboration in which a customer helps a provider develop and refine a new product.

documents.name: Service Level Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments, service credits, and support terms for a hosted service.

documents.name: Professional Services Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement covering the delivery of consulting or implementation services, typically defined through statements of work.

documents.name: Data Processing Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement setting out how personal data is processed on behalf of a customer in compliance with applicable data protection laws (e.g. GDPR).

documents.name: Software License Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement governing the licensing of on-premise or downloadable software between a provider and a customer.

documents.name: Partnership Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement establishing a commercial partnership, including referral, reseller, or co-marketing arrangements between two companies.

documents.name: Pilot Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for a time-limited trial or proof-of-concept evaluation of a product before entering a full commercial agreement.

documents.name: Business Associate Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement addressing the handling of protected health information (PHI) under HIPAA between a covered entity and a business associate.

documents.name: AI Addendum
documents.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum that supplements an existing agreement with terms specific to the provision and use of artificial intelligence products and features.
